name: Karson Kammerzell
summary: Former U.S. Navy cryptologic technician associated with shipboard records and communications connected to the 2004 Nimitz encounter.
profileSummary: Former U.S. Navy cryptologic technician associated with shipboard records and communications connected to the 2004 Nimitz encounter.
inclusionNote: Included because of his named public account concerning records, communications, and logs associated with the Nimitz events.
